lines: Population. India dominates with 1.4 billion people. Japan has just 125 million.
GDP. Japan takes this at 4.2 trillion dollars. India follows with 3.7 trillion.
Land Area. India is much larger at 3.3 million square kilometers. Japan has just 378 thousand.
Military Personnel. India leads with 1.5 million active soldiers. Japan has 247 thousand.
Life Expectancy. Japan dominates at 84 years. One of the highest in the world. India is at 70.
Nobel Prizes. Japan leads with 29 Nobel laureates. India has 13.
Internet Users. India wins with 900 million users. Japan has 117 million.
Space Missions. India has launched over 120 missions. Japan has launched 98.
The final score. Five to four. India wins!
